australian_relation: ABC public article with a distinct doctor-spirit claim attached to the Willow Court morgue in New Norfolk, Tasmania.
coordinate_evidence_note: ABC page names Willow Court in New Norfolk and the morgue spirit claim; coordinates use the state-checked OSM/Nominatim Willow Court Historic Site point.
evidence_summary: ABC reported that the Willow Court morgue was believed by the ghost-hunting group to be home to the spirit of an unnamed doctor. Stan Herd said he had experienced negative encounters with the doctor and felt extremely angry and uncomfortable in the spirit's presence.
location_text: Willow Court Historic Site, New Norfolk, TAS
publication_or_organisation: Ghost hunters conduct global seance via Facebook at Australia's oldest mental hospital; ABC News Tasmania
title: doctor in Willow Court morgue doctor spirit
